name: ai_marketing_claude_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_claude capability.

prompts.name: website_audit_prompt
prompts.template: Audit the website at {website_url} and identify areas to improve marketing effectiveness including SEO, user engagement, and content quality.
prompts.use_case: Marketing agencies auditing client websites and generating comprehensive marketing plans

prompts.name: marketing_copy_prompt
prompts.template: Generate persuasive marketing copy targeting {target_audience} focused on these goals: {marketing_goals}.
prompts.use_case: Small business owners seeking automated marketing content generation

prompts.name: email_sequence_prompt
prompts.template: Create a sequence of {number_of_emails} marketing emails tailored for {target_audience} to achieve {campaign_goal}.
prompts.use_case: Content strategists creating synchronized content calendars and email drip campaigns

prompts.name: ad_campaign_prompt
prompts.template: Design an ad campaign including messaging and targeting parameters based on {campaign_parameters}.
prompts.use_case: Digital advertisers designing AI-powered ad campaigns based on competitive insights

prompts.name: content_calendar_prompt
prompts.template: Develop a monthly content calendar with posting dates, topics, and content types aligned with {marketing_goals}.
prompts.use_case: Consultants preparing client-ready presentations with detailed marketing intelligence

prompts.name: competitive_intelligence_prompt
prompts.template: Analyze key competitors within {industry} and summarize their marketing strategies and positioning.
